2. "The Breaks" by Kurtis Blow (1980) - This song is another early example of hip hop and features a strong rap performance and a catchy hook.

4. "The Message" by Grandmaster Flash and the Furious Five (1982) - This song is often cited as one of the most influential hip hop songs of all time and is known for its socially conscious lyrics and powerful message.
